queries.query: Fix the failing arithmetic test and add regression coverage.
The login form regressed; reproduce and correct the root cause.
Resolve this stack trace with the smallest safe patch.
Repair the incorrect parser behavior.
A test started failing after the last change; fix it.
Correct the null-handling defect and verify neighboring cases.
Find why this command errors and implement the fix.
Patch the reproducible race without unrelated refactoring.
Explain what this error message means without editing files.
Review this bug-fix diff.
Add a new login feature.
Verify the current UI error state visually.
Write a bug report for another team.
Run the existing tests and report results only.
Refactor the parser for readability.
Document known defects in the README source.
Reproduce the reported parser regression and apply the smallest covered fix.
Correct this confirmed failure and add regression coverage.
Explain this stack trace without changing anything.
Implement a new endpoint that has not existed before.
